channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Steam Machine launches June 30, starting at $1,049
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Two terabyte model with controller priced at $1,428.

Steam Machine will launch on June 30, Valve announced. The 512 gigabyte model without a controller will be priced at $1,049, while the two terabyte model with a Steam Controller and two extra faceplates will cost $1,428. Reservation sign-ups are available here.

Here are the details:

  • Steam Machine (512GB) – $1,049
    • Semi-custom AMD Zen 4 6C / 12T
    • Semi-custom AMD RDNA3 28CUs
    • 16GB DDR5 + 8GB GDDR6 VRAM
    • 512GB NVMe SSD, microSD card slot
    • Wi-Fi 6E, Bluetooth 5.3, Gigabit ethernet
    • Integrated Steam Controller wireless adapter
    • Small form factor, approximately 6 inch cube
    • SteamOS 3
  • Steam Machine (2TB) with Controller – $1,428
    • Semi-custom AMD Zen 4 6C / 12T
    • Semi-custom AMD RDNA3 28CUs
    • 16GB DDR5 + 8GB GDDR6 VRAM
    • 2TB NVMe SSD, microSD card slot
    • Wi-Fi 6E, Bluetooth 5.3, Gigabit ethernet
    • Integrated Steam Controller wireless adapter
    • Small form factor, approximately 6 inch cube
    • SteamOS 3
    • Extra faceplates – red fabric and solid walnut
    • This bundle includes Steam Controller

In order to create a system that is “more fair for everyone,” Valve will be accepting reservation sign-ups over the course of a few days—until June 25 at 10:00 a.m. PT / 1:00 p.m. ET—allowing users to take their time, and Valve to do some extra validation to make sure those who sign up are real accounts ant not bots. To apply, you must have a Steam account in good standing and have made a purchase on Steam prior to April 27, 2026. Only one sign-up is allowed per household. Users will be chosen at random and emailed the week of June 29.

Read more about Steam Machine here.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/steam-machine-launches-june-30-starting-at-1049
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
